allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const src=fs.readFileSync\('src/App.js','utf8'\); console.log\('Lines:', src.split\('\\n'\).length\); console.log\('LiveTimingTab defined:', src.includes\('function LiveTimingTab'\)\); console.log\('timing tab rendered:', src.includes\('tab === \\"timing\\"'\)\); console.log\('timing tab button:', src.includes\('\\"timing\\"'\)\); console.log\('OF1 endpoints referenced:', \(src.match\(/OF1\\//g\)||[]\).length\);")
